name: SHORT EXPIRY - CLEARANCE: Unique Veterinary Prescription Diet Adult Cat Urinary Chicken 5kg
shortDescription: It is used to prevent and prevent recurrence of urinary tract stones that develop in the urinary tract. It ensures the health of the urinary tract by creating an optimal pH level in the urinary tract. Due to its special formulation, it will help protect your cat against the formation of urinary stones by acidifying the urinary tract pH content. Thanks to its high-quality animal protein sources and low grain ratio, it is a food that fully meets your cat's nutritional needs.
description: How it works: Preventing the formation of urinary tract stones with optimal urine PH (6.4-6.6), Urine acidifying properties and low magnesium level (0.05%), Quality and hydrolyzed protein sources, Composition containing organic trace elements, Dried algae (source of omega-3 and vitamins), Marigold extract (anti-inflammatory and antiseptic). Ingredients Chicken Protein, Brown Rice, Pea, Chicken Oil, Hydrolyzed Chicken Protein, Corn Gluten Meal, Sodium Chloride, Sugar Beet Pulp, Fish Oil, Hydrolyzed Chicken Liver, Vitamin and Mineral Premix, Natural Flavors, Brewer's Yeast, Calcium Sulphate, Probiotic, Dried Algae, MOS, ?-Glucan, Tocopherol, Marigold Extract, Yucca, Cranberry, Glycosaminoglycan, Chondrotin Sulfate, Wild Seaweed. Raw Material Components Raw Protein 32.74% Raw oil 15.12% Raw Cellulose (Fiber) 2.15% Ash 7.40% Moisture 5.20% Omega-3 1.05% Omega 6 3.60% Calcium 0.75% Phosphorus 0.60% Sodium 0.40% Magnesium 0.05% Potassium 0.45% chloride 0.43% Urine Acidifying Substances Sodium Chlorite 1.00% Calcium Sulphate 0.70% methionine 5000mg/kg It does not contain sulfur dioxide. Nutritional Supplements Vitamin A (3a672a) 25,000 IU/kg Vitamin D 3 (E671) 500 IU/kg Vitamin E (3a700) 1.000 mg/kg Choline Chloride (3a890) 2.300 mg/kg Biotin (3a880) 3mg/kg Vitamin B 1 (3a821) 10mg/kg Vitamin B2 30mg/kg Niacinamide (3a315) 100mg/kg Calcium-D-Panthothenate (3a841) 60mg/kg Vitamin B 6 (3a831) 35mg/kg Folic Acid (3a316) 15mg/kg Vitamin B 12 0.18 mg/kg Zinc Chelate of Amino Acids Hydrate (3b606) 120mg/kg Ferrous Chelate of Amino Acids Hydrate (E1) 60mg/kg Manganese Chelate of Amino Acids Hydrate (E5) 60mg/kg Potassium Iodide (3b201) 4mg/kg Cupric Chelate of Amino Acids Hydrate (E4) 3,5 mg/kg Organic Form of Selenium (3b8.10) 0.2mg/kg Taurine (3a370) 2.300 mg/kg L-Carnitine (3a910) 230mg/kg L-Methionine (3c305) 5,000 mg/kg L-Tryptophan 1.400 mg/kg Probiotic (B. Amyloliquefaciens) 7 x 10 14 /kg
